removeConfirm.title: Remove User
removeConfirm.desc: Are you sure you want to remove "{{name}}" from this project?

invites.title: Invite Keys
invites.noKeysDesc: Create an invite key to let others join this project

tokens.title: API Tokens
tokens.noTokensDesc: Create a token to authenticate API requests

revealDialog.title: Token Created
revealDialog.desc: Copy this token now. You won't be able to see it again.

twofa.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twofa.scanQr: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app
twofa.backupDesc: Save these codes. Each can be used once.

ip.title: IP Access Control
ip.appliesTo: Applies to external API requests only. Panel access is never blocked.

geo.title: Geo Blocking
geo.countriesHint: ISO country codes, one per line (US, DE, RU...)

rls.title: Row-Level Security
rls.noRulesDesc: Add rules to restrict data access at the row level
rls.explanation: Row-Level Security filters data for external API consumers. When your app's users call your API endpoints, they only see rows that match the rules below. The admin panel is never restricted — you always see all data when working in DataForge.
rls.whenToUse: Use RLS when your API serves multiple users and each should only access their own data. For example: a game where players see only their inventory, or a SaaS where tenants see only their organization's records.
rls.panelNote: Admin panel is never affected by RLS rules

backups.title: Backups
backups.noBackupsDesc: Create your first backup to protect your data
backups.warning: Download backups regularly — we do not guarantee data safety on the server
backups.rateLimitReached: Daily limit reached. Try again tomorrow.
backups.scheduleDesc: Old backups are deleted automatically when the limit is reached

deleteConfirm.title: Delete Backup
deleteConfirm.desc: Are you sure? This cannot be undone.

restoreConfirm.title: Restore Backup
restoreConfirm.desc: This will replace ALL current data with the backup. Are you sure?

projectSettings.title: Project Settings
projectSettings.name: Project Name
projectSettings.deleteDesc: Permanently delete this project and all its data. Type the project slug to confirm.

graphql.title: GraphQL API
graphql.enableDesc: Expose a GraphQL endpoint for this project. Auto-generates schema from all tables.

websocket.title: WebSocket API
websocket.enableDesc: Real-time WebSocket connections for live data updates. Clients subscribe to table channels and receive INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE events.

cache.title: Cache Management
cache.description: Cache is automatically invalidated when data changes. You can also manually clear all caches.

myNodes.title: My Nodes
myNodes.description: Deploy and manage your own worker nodes for increased resources and self-hosted workloads.
myNodes.emptyDesc: Deploy your own worker node to run projects on your infrastructure.
myNodes.deleteDesc: Node "{{name}}" will be removed from the control panel. Files and containers on the server will remain — after deletion you will be shown a command for manual cleanup.

cleanupDialog.title: Node Deleted
cleanupDialog.desc: Node "{{name}}" has been removed from the panel. Docker containers and files remain on the server. To fully clean up, run this command on the server:
cleanupDialog.warning: This command will stop all DataForge containers and delete all PostgreSQL and Redis data on this node. Only run it if you are sure.

wizard.title: Add My Node
wizard.name: Node Name
wizard.installDesc: Run this command on your server to install the DataForge worker node. The command includes your setup token which expires in 1 hour.
wizard.connectedDesc: Your node is online and ready to host projects.

myNodes.tokenReady: Run this command on your server. Token expires in 1 hour.
myNodes.pendingSetupDesc: This node was created but hasn't been connected yet. Get the install command to set it up.
myNodes.updateFailedDesc: Failed to update node. Check logs.
myNodes.editUrlHint: Worker address, e.g. https://fl.dataforge.me or http://IP:PORT

updateDialog.title: Update Node
updateDialog.confirmDesc: Watchtower will pull the new image and restart the container. This takes 1-2 minutes.
updateDialog.wait: Don't close this window. The page will update automatically.
